title: radical eyes
body:
))}}

))}}

[▶︎ pineapple coconut | bjorn vader](https://bjornvader.bandcamp.com/track/pineapple-coconut)

))}}

either way i gotta go outside
don't cry. this ain't goodbye
when i get back
i'll let you know what i find
well not exactly but what home remind me of
while i'm here i'm half-waiting for a war to sign me up
cuz when we die inside noone's there to id us
i'm half kiddin but that's the half we still hope is just missin
and i miss im
i'm on that mission til the case closes
but i'm mad distant so i won't know it
when they close the case and noone's waiting
for information back at the station
saying they're making the clocks run on time
i'm not that patient
i've got a different diagnosis
in no uncertain terms i know what my fate is
and i get it, god knows i don't hate it
i know what my state is
don't pledge allegiance. that's the wrong relationship
this too will pass
for now i gotta stay with it
til the body collapse
that's the gravity of the situation
my mind is a spaceship
someone designed with no space to take you in
you got one too but we don't want the game to end
so we huddle like orphans our mother stopped playin with

))}}

))}}
